notFound.description: The route you requested is not available in the current web workspace. Use the primary navigation or go back to the visit logs page.
notFound.title: Page not found

routeError.description: The current route failed before the page could render normally. Return to a stable page and try again.
routeError.responseDescription: The route returned {{status}} {{statusText}} before the page could render normally. Return to a stable page and try again.
routeError.title: Route failed to render
